raw_consumer_statement: Received a bill either a payment reversal on XX/XX/year>. They didnt owe me nor did I owe them. Have called starting on XX/XX/year> numerous times. No ine can figure out why this has happened. Its my Best Buy credit card not store card. Its a XXXX. As of yesterday I was told to write a letter to Citi resolve disputes. I did open a case & have a case number. They wrote me to say i owe the {$1700.00}. I do not. It wasnt a purchase. I have paid on this bill even though I believe its a mistake on their part. I cant seem to get anyone to help. I did speak to a woman named XXXX on XX/XX/year>. She said it made no sense to her either. Im begging for help. I have paid over {$2000.00} as of this letter. The purchases were far less than that. Please help me figure out how to fix this.
